name: Qingdao Copton Technology Company Limited
summary: Qingdao Copton Technology Company Limited produces and sells lubricants and car care products in China. The company offers automotive lubricants, industrial lubricants, motorcycle lubricants, greases, antifreeze fluids, brake fluids, and other lubrications for vehicles and equipment; and automotive engine lubrication, fuel, transmission, gearbox, engine intake/exhaust, power steering, cooling, and air conditioning systems, as well as industrial equipment maintenance products. It provides lubricants under the Copton brand name and car care products under the Roab brand name. The company is based in Qingdao, China.
